original_text:
The three approved brand colors in hierarchy order are: (1) 
#00529B Deep Blue (dominant), (2) 
#FAA31B Amber Orange (secondary accent), (3) 
#FFC60A Golden Yellow (tertiary accent).

Agenda, is the primary headline font
and should be used for all headlines and headers.
Nunito Sans should be used for
all body copy in print.

Agenda:


Nunito Sans:
https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Nunito+Sans:ital,opsz,wght@0,6..12,200..1000;1,6..12,200..1000&display=swap" rel="stylesheet

use this shape and treatment for CTAs:

rules.intent: Maintain the approved visual hierarchy of core brand colors.
rules.rule_text: Use the approved brand-color hierarchy: Deep Blue (#00529B) is dominant, Amber Orange (#FAA31B) is the secondary accent, and Golden Yellow (#FFC60A) is the tertiary accent.

rules.intent: Keep headline and header typography aligned to the primary brand typeface.
rules.rule_text: Use Agenda as the primary headline font for all headlines and headers.

rules.intent: Maintain the specified print body-copy typeface.
rules.rule_text: For print body copy, use Nunito Sans.

rules.rule_text: CTAs use the supplied asymmetric 180×59 SVG shape and the approved yellow-to-orange gradient treatment (#FFDF55 → #FAA21B).
